The '''Thennqora''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Thennqor system/Legends|Thennqor system]] that influenced [[Saffa (species)|Saffa]] [[Saffa paintings|paintings]] after their initial contact, several millennia before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Tamish]] was a member of this species.

==Extraneous==
The name is misspelled "Thenngora" in the [[Star Wars: Heir to the Empire (comic series)|comic adaptation]] of [[Heir to the Empire]].{{Species-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|First Contact|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
